productDisplayName: Nike Men's Egoli White Black Shoe
description: A perfect boot for a striker, the nike Egoli TF is designed to be lightweight to allow great speed and excellent ball control. A great entry level soccer shoe, the nike Egoli TF has a sleek, predatory look that makes it a great lifestyle casual wear shoe as well.Upper Trophy synthetic leather in a sleek silhouette package Knit laces across the centre for snug Fit and to lock the foot in place Padded collar for added comfort and snug fit Invert foldable tongue for funky look Stitch detailing across the toe box for added durability High density recycled sockliner for enhanced comfort Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel Full phylon midsole with TPU shank for stability Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with micro studs for optimum turf use Moulded rubber outsole with multi-directional studs and herringbone pattern for optimal traction Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
